game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ロックマンX DiVE オフライン (Rockman X DiVE Offline):** Players control iconic "Rockman X" characters in a 2D side-scrolling action platformer, navigating through hundreds of stages within the "Deep Log" cyberworld. Movement is controlled via a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen, while virtual buttons on the right trigger actions such as jumping, dashing, firing a buster, and performing saber attacks, complemented by 360-degree shooting and an auto-lock-on system for simplified combat. Each stage presents a series of platforming challenges and enemy encounters, often culminating in a boss fight, with successful completion unlocking subsequent levels and awarding materials for character and equipment progression. Progression involves collecting and upgrading over 100 unique characters, enhancing them with various weapons, chips, and collectible cards; weapons can be freely combined with any character and ranked up through collected materials to unlock new active or passive skills. Difficulty scales through increasing enemy health, damage output, and spawn rates, alongside more intricate level designs and boss attack patterns, as players strive to repair the corrupted game data and achieve 100% stage completion.
game_info.description: Navigate through the Deep Log cyberworld as a legendary reploid warrior. Battle through waves of corrupted enemies across multiple stages, collecting energy crystals and power-ups to enhance your abilities. Defeat the stage boss to complete each level and progress deeper into the corrupted data. Survive enemy attacks while managing your health and energy to achieve 100% stage completion.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move left/right, aim weapon up/down
Space: Jump (press twice for double jump)
Z: Fire primary weapon (auto-aims at nearest enemy)
Shift: Dash forward (requires energy)
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and navigation through the first stage. Validates that the player can move, jump, and traverse platforms without getting stuck. Ensures collision detection works properly with platforms and boundaries.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move right continuously while jumping over gaps and obstacles. Test both left and right movement, jumping mechanics, and platform collision. Avoid enemies when possible to focus on movement validation.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates across multiple platforms, demonstrating proper collision detection and movement physics. Character position updates correctly and doesn't fall through platforms or get stuck in walls.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully navigates across multiple platforms, demonstrating proper collision detection and movement physics. Character position updates correctly and doesn't fall through platforms or get stuck in walls.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete gameplay loop to achieve a win condition. Validates combat mechanics, enemy interactions, power-up collection, and boss defeat. This is the optimal strategy to complete Stage 1 and win the game.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Advance through the stage while eliminating enemies using auto-aimed shots. Collect energy crystals and health pickups strategically. Use dash to dodge enemy projectiles. Engage the boss with focused fire while avoiding attack patterns, utilizing double jumps and dashes for mobility.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player successfully completes Stage 1 by defeating all enemies and the boss, triggering the GAME_OVER_WIN state. Health management and power-up collection demonstrate understanding of resource management. Combat effectiveness shows proper use of weapons and movement abilities.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests combat mechanics and weapon usage. Validates that shooting works correctly, auto-aim targets nearest enemies, projectiles hit and damage enemies, and energy system functions properly for special abilities.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Engage enemies at various distances and angles. Test auto-aim by positioning between multiple enemies. Fire continuously to test energy consumption and regeneration. Use dash ability to validate energy cost mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Weapon fires correctly with auto-aim targeting the nearest enemy. Projectiles deal damage and enemies are defeated. Energy depletes when using abilities and regenerates over time. Combat feels responsive and effective.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests survival mechanics and difficulty progression. Validates that player can take damage, health system works correctly, and game over condition triggers when health reaches zero.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Intentionally take damage from enemies and projectiles. Monitor health bar depletion. Test invincibility frames after taking damage. Allow health to reach zero to validate game over condition.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player health decreases when hit by enemies or projectiles. Visual feedback shows damage taken. Brief invincibility period prevents instant multi-hits. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE when health depletes completely.
TEST_4.description: Tests survival mechanics and difficulty progression. Validates that player can take damage, health system works correctly, and game over condition triggers when health reaches zero.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests power-up collection and upgrade systems. Validates that collectibles appear, can be picked up, and provide appropriate benefits to the player's abilities or health.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Actively seek and collect energy crystals and health pickups. Test that pickups restore health and increase score. Validate that collected items disappear and provide immediate feedback.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Collectibles can be picked up through collision detection. Health pickups restore player health appropriately. Energy crystals increase score. Visual and gameplay feedback confirms successful collection.
